name: Beef Noodle Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-stick skillet, brown the ground round and onion. Drain any excess grease.
2. Thicken the milk with flour (or cornstarch) by whisking together until smooth.
3. Add wine, mushrooms, oregano, pepper, and cheese to the saucepan.
4. Stir the sauce into the meat mixture and heat until boiling.
5. Serve over cooked noodles (1/2 cup per serving).
